source.title: Omnisend study: Temu vs Amazon price, trust, and competition (Dec 2024-Jan 2025)

extractions.claim: Temu close-match products average 40% cheaper than Amazon ($13.37 savings per product). But identical branded products show only ~1% price difference. The 40% gap is driven by unbranded/white-label goods, not brand-for-brand competition.
extractions.evidence: Omnisend study (Dec 2024-Jan 2025) analyzing 23 categories: 77% of Amazon products have close match on Temu. 1 in 10 are identical. Close-match products ~40% cheaper on Temu. Identical branded products ~1% cheaper. Fashion/apparel 55% cheaper, automotive 12% cheaper on Amazon. 94% match rate in fashion, lowest in food/beverage.

verification.verifier_notes: Omnisend research published Jan 2025, widely cited by Yahoo Finance, TechRadar, BeBold Digital. Methodology: cross-platform price comparison across 23 categories.

extractions.claim: Temu discount strategy more aggressive than Amazon: 65% of Temu listings marked down (avg 43% discount) vs 47% of Amazon listings (avg 18% discount). Some Temu discounts up to 98%.
extractions.evidence: Omnisend data: 65% of Temu products discounted vs 47% on Amazon. Temu average discount rate ~43%, Amazon ~18%. Maximum discounts: Temu 98%, Amazon 67%.

verification.verifier_notes: Omnisend study data, corroborated by Debutify and BeBold analyses

extractions.claim: Trust gap massive: only 5% of US consumers trust Temu despite 53% shopping there in past year. Amazon average product has ~50,000 reviews vs Temu's ~1,500. Signs of review manipulation on Temu (disappearing negative reviews, relisted products).
extractions.evidence: Omnisend consumer survey: 53% shopped on Temu in past year, 5% shop several times per week, but only 5% say they trust Temu. Average Amazon product: ~50,000 reviews. Average Temu product: ~1,500 reviews. Researchers found signs of review manipulation.

verification.verifier_notes: Omnisend survey data. Trust gap corroborated by Chain Store Age survey and Probolsky Research.

extractions.claim: Brand imitation concerns on Temu: many products closely resemble well-known brands but with tweaked packaging, blurred logos, or branding removed. In camera/photo category, 96% match rate but 0% same brand.
extractions.evidence: Omnisend: 'uncovered brand imitation concerns on Temu, with many products closely resembling well-known brands—but with tweaked packaging, blurred logos or branding removed entirely.' Camera/photo: 96% close match rate, 0.0% same brand.

verification.verifier_notes: Omnisend study finding, also covered by Tech Digest
